title: TypeScript, JavaScript, and the TypeScript 7 Toolchain · Narrowing Workshop
summary: Trace a service-status module through TypeScript 7 checking, JavaScript emission, module loading, and runtime behavior. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a compiler-to-runtime evidence notebook while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish compile-time type evidence from emitted JavaScript and runtime validation.
Predict which TypeScript constructs erase, transform, or affect emitted JavaScript and source maps.
Use the TypeScript 7 native compiler and explain when a TypeScript 6 API compatibility tool remains necessary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
